security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data: blob:; font-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; frame-src 'self' data: blob:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'

bundle.longDescription: Tomo is a lightweight, offline, git-first API client. Collections are plain folders of readable TOML files.
